title: Add 'Sign up without a password' button to /signup
description: Add a secondary magic link sign-up option below the password form with a divider and a separate email field.
acceptance_criteria: A visible divider ('or') separates the password form from the magic link section
A button or link reads 'Sign up without a password'
Clicking it shows a small inline email input and a 'Send link' button (the password form remains visible but the magic link section becomes the active focus)
Button has id='magic-link-btn' for JS targeting

steps.details:
or
— style with CSS: flex, 1px lines either side of the 'or' text.
document.getElementById('magic-link-btn').addEventListener('click', () => { document.getElementById('magic-link-form').hidden = false; }); — JS logic for actually sending the link is in TASK-016.
